kpi_results.evidence: 20 enum consistency tests pass - all 6 AIOutputTypes, 6 ReviewStatuses, and 5 ReviewDecisions match domain constants
RLS migration created at infra/supabase/migrations/20260204000000_ai_output_review_rls.sql with tenant isolation and audit immutability policies
Prisma schema validates successfully (npx prisma validate returns exit 0)

definition_of_done_items.evidence: Model includes tenantId FK with CASCADE delete and @@index([tenantId])
AIOutputReviewAudit model created with reviewId FK and immutable audit trail structure
Indexes created: @@index([tenantId, status]), @@index([status, slaDeadline]), @@index([tenantId, createdAt(sort: Desc)])

invariants_acknowledged: Multi-tenancy via tenantId FK with CASCADE delete
Immutable audit trail (no UPDATE/DELETE RLS policies)

completion_status.notes: All TDD phases completed successfully. Schema validated, tests passing, build successful.

notes: IFC-178 AI Output Review Database Schema fully implemented and deployed. 3 Prisma enums (AIOutputType, ReviewStatus, ReviewDecision) and 2 models (AIOutputReview, AIOutputReviewAudit) added. All 37 tests pass. Tables created in Supabase database via SQL migration. RLS policies applied with tenant isolation using public.get_current_tenant_id() and public.is_service_role() helper functions. Audit table is append-only (no UPDATE/DELETE policies). Database introspection confirms tables and indexes exist.
